View Projects Download Resume LinkedIn

Profile

Architecture with clarity, craft, and technical confidence.

Maitry Lapsiwala is an architectural designer pursuing a Master of Architecture at the University of Texas at San Antonio. Her work bridges architecture and interior design through rigorous spatial thinking, BIM documentation, visualization, material research, and sustainable design strategies.

Her experience includes luxury interior design, construction drawing sets, client presentations, site visits, consultant coordination, 3D modeling, and design development across residential and commercial projects.

3.78M.Arch GPA
3+Design Roles
16+Core Skills

Selected Work

Case studies in architecture, interiors, sustainability, and representation.

01 / Public Realm + Cultural Space

Civic Threshold

A civic design study focused on movement, gathering, spatial sequence, and the relationship between architecture and urban life.

02 / Housing + Community

Living Framework

A residential design exploration balancing density, privacy, shared amenities, daylight, and neighborhood connection.

03 / Interior Architecture

Interior Atmosphere

An interior-focused project emphasizing materiality, proportion, lighting, visual storytelling, and user experience.

04 / Sustainable Design

Environmental Logic

A performance-minded design study exploring daylight, passive strategies, climate response, and occupant well-being.

05 / Technical Representation

Drawings + Documentation

Selected drawings, diagrams, sections, elevations, and presentation work demonstrating technical clarity.

Experience

Professional background that supports both design and delivery.

Maitry brings experience in project documentation, interior architecture, material research, presentation development, and coordination with clients, consultants, vendors, contractors, and site teams.

Junior Designer Intern

Spaces Designed · Austin, TX
Residential and commercial project support, space planning, material selection, site visits, documentation, and design presentations.

Junior Designer

HPA · Hiren Patel Architects · Ahmedabad, India
Construction drawing sets, plans, sections, elevations, 3D models, client presentations, and site coordination.

Design Intern

Vaaste Architects · Surat, India
AutoCAD drawings, site analysis, 3D modeling, material palettes, research, and visual presentations.
